hero.eyebrow: Full Stack Developer / React / Node.js / TypeScript
hero.title: I build full-stack web apps.
hero.description: AI writes code fast. I make sure the product actually makes sense. I am not better than AI, but I am better with it.
hero.buildsDesc: Selected builds across product, portfolio, and dashboard work.

about.title: I care about the quality of both the code and the feeling of the interface.
about.lead: I am a full stack developer who enjoys building complete web products, from frontend presentation and interaction to backend structure, APIs, and data flow.
about.body: My approach balances clean engineering with strong visual presentation. I want the interface to feel intentional and the system behind it to stay maintainable as it grows.
about.highlight1: Strong attention to layout systems, spacing, typography, and component reuse.
about.highlight2: Comfortable translating rough ideas into structured interfaces with clear hierarchy.
about.highlight3: Focused on maintainable React code, scalable styling, and responsive behavior.

projects.title: A few projects that reflect how I approach product and interface design.
projects.empty: Projects will appear here once they are added from the admin page.

contact.title: If you want a site that feels sharper than the template stage, let's build it.
contact.lead: I am interested in full stack products, frontend-heavy builds, and UI-focused collaborations that need both good engineering and a strong visual result.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} Akhrorbek. Built with React, TypeScript, and Vite.

admin.title: Update your resume and project list from one place.
admin.lead: This panel writes to MongoDB for projects and stores the latest PDF resume on the server so the public portfolio always points to the newest file.
